No preview generated yet. Render this template yourself using the JSON file at templates/chore-charts/pixel-block-builder-voxel-chore-chart.json.

Pixel Block Builder Chart

Sharp-edged pixel blocks, pickaxes, and dirt-brown borders bring the voxel world to life. Grass green headers and earthy brown accents create an 8-bit block-building adventure on a flat vector canvas — every chore is a block placed toward your build.

View JSON

Want to customize this template — change colors, add your own chores, swap the theme?
